SHOP THE SALE

20% off all markdowns from 7/1/26 at 12am PT to 7/7/26 at 11:59pm PT. Discount applied automatically at checkout, taken off of redlined markdown price. Offer valid online at rothys.com, or at Rothy’s official retail stores and outlets during local store hours; any third-party retailers offering discounts are subject to their own terms and conditions.  All items sold as part of The Semi Annual Event are offered at limited quantities for a limited time, while supplies last. Sale prices cannot be retroactively applied to purchases made before the event began. May not be combined with any other offers, promotions, or discounts. Prices are as marked. Products marked Final Sale cannot be returned, exchanged or refunded for cash value or store credit. Valid only in the US, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. Discounts may vary due to exchange rates and taxes. Void where prohibited.

Women's Shoes

Made with quality, sustainably-made materials that are built to last. Meet our comfortable, washable women’s shoes and discover what all the hype’s about.
WOMEN'S SHOES
BAGS & ACCESSORIES
KIDS SHOES
MEN'S SHOES

About Women's Shoes

Read More
Read Less

What types of women’s shoes can I buy at Rothy’s?

Rothy’s offers women’s shoes that are perfect for any season and any occasion. From seasonal favorites like spring and summer sandals to fall and winter boots for women, Rothy's has a variety of women’s shoes to suit your unique style. With these and traditional year-round styles, such as flats, clogs, Mary Janes, slip-on and lace-up sneakers, and loafers, find machine-washable women's shoes that are sustainable, stylish, comfortable and versatile. 

Discover our best-selling women’s shoes like The Max Square Mary Jane, The Square Mary Jane, The Casual Clog, The Flat, The Point II, and more. Rothy’s offers women’s shoes in a variety of silhouettes including round-toe, pointed-toe, and square-toe in classic colors like black, blue, red, and neutrals, as well as patterns, metallics, bright colors, prints, and embellishments. You’ll find plenty of stylish footwear options to coordinate with your wardrobe.

What women’s shoe sizes does Rothy’s carry?

Rothy's shoes for women are currently available in U.S. sizes 5-13 (EU sizes 35 to 43). We also carry half sizes, such as a 5.5 or a 10.5, to ensure a snug fit. In terms of measurements, women's shoes from Rothy's range from 8.6 inches to 11.3 inches in length, or 21.9 centimeters to 28.7 centimeters. Shoes are designed with our signature knit fabric that can fit wide, narrow, and problematic feet. However, we recommend measuring your foot if you're concerned about what shoe size to order. Keep in mind that our shoes also won't stretch over time. Visit our Fit Guide for more information.

Does Rothy’s offer wide width shoes for women?

Select Rothy’s shoes for women, including The Point II and The Bow Point II, are available in both regular and wide sizes in U.S. 5-13 (EU 35 to 43). Whether you are looking for a pair to wear for casual or dressy occasions, our wide width women’s flats offer improved comfort with more wiggle room in the toe box and midfoot areas. 

Are Rothy’s women’s shoes comfortable?

Yes! Our women’s shoes are not only top-tier in terms of style, but they're also designed with comfort in mind. From The Flat to The Lace Up Sneaker, your shoes will get you where you need to go comfortably. Discover our innovative In Love Insole™ for unbelievable, cushion-like comfort from heel-to-toe in some of our favorite women’s shoes. Rothy’s shoes offer a more spacious toe box for less scrunching and bunching, and durable rubber outsoles for traction. You’ll be reaching for your Rothy’s for everyday wear and special occasions. They’re sure to become both the most comfortable and stylish pair of shoes in your closet.

Are Rothy’s shoes vegan?

At Rothy’s, we believe in a sustainable future, and we are proud to offer vegan shoes for women, sustainably knit from our signature thread spun from plastic bottles and other sustainable materials. All of our women’s shoes with our signature thread are 100% vegan, ethical and cruelty-free, made with the planet in mind.

Where can I buy high-quality, sustainable shoes for women?

You can purchase Rothy’s online or visit us in-store. Rothy's women's shoes are not only stylish, but they're also sustainable and created with recycled materials. Even better, they are machine washable, so you can make the most of your favorite pair. If you're looking for a way to reduce your carbon footprint, shopping from sustainable brands is a great first step.

What other sustainable shoes and accessories does Rothy’s offer?

In addition to sustainable women’s shoes from recycled materials, Rothy’s offers men’s shoes in various styles, including sneakers, loafers, clogs, and more. You can also shop kid’s shoes, including matching Mini styles. We also carry a wide range of sustainable handbags, including crossbody bags, shoulder bags, backpacks, totes, and small accessories to accessorize any outfit.
